question: How can I book a custom portrait or artwork?
answer: Booking a custom artwork is simple. Contact me through the Contact section, Instagram, WhatsApp, or Email with your reference photo and artwork requirements. After discussing the details, size, medium, timeline, and pricing, your commission will be confirmed.

question: What types of artworks do you create?
answer: I specialize in hand-drawn Charcoal, Graphite, Color Pencil, and Mixed Media artworks including portraits, devotional art, wildlife, pet portraits, family portraits, and custom commissioned drawings. Every artwork is created entirely by hand without AI or digital printing.

question: Do you offer drawing classes and personal mentorship?
answer: Yes. I provide one-to-one drawing mentorship, online classes, and structured guidance for beginners, intermediate learners, and advanced artists. Students learn fundamentals, shading, realism, charcoal, graphite, color pencil techniques, and complete artwork creation.

question: How long does it take to complete a commissioned artwork?
answer: The completion time depends on the artwork size and level of detail. Most commissions are completed within 2 to 4 weeks. Larger or highly detailed artworks may require additional time. An estimated delivery date is shared before starting the project.

question: Can artworks be shipped safely?
answer: Yes. Every artwork is carefully protected using professional packaging materials to ensure it reaches safely. Secure shipping is available across India, and international delivery can also be arranged upon request.
